creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
The latest and final version in the 4.[12] branch has been made
available on the master site.

Fix: Please apply the following patches which will touch the following
files:
  * Makefile
  * files/md5
  * patches/patch-ab

 Thank you,
 Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)

--8<--
